headline: Is Linde (LIN) One of the Best Basic Materials Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
summary: Linde (NASDAQ:LIN) is one of the best basic materials stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On May 1, Linde reported solid Q1 2026 results, with sales rising 8% to $8.8 billion and adjusted EPS increasing 10% to $4.33. This was driven by a 3% increase in underlying sales, supported by price attainment and project […]
